perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco warehouse aisle, each holding a character-themed water bottle. (2) Close-up shots transition between a green 'Nick Wilde' bottle and a blue 'Judy Hopps' bottle, highlighting the figurines on the lids and the colorful straps. (3) The camera focuses on the price tag on the warehouse shelf showing '$459'. (4) One woman demonstrates opening the bottle, showing a pop-up lid with a straw and then the interior vacuum flask. (5) The women pose together with the products, gesturing enthusiastically while more close-ups show the character designs and the 'Zootopia' branding.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music starts immediately. A female voice introduces the product with an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) As the visuals shift to product details, the vocal narration continues describing the features like capacity (430ml) and character names. (3) A cartoonish 'boing' sound effect plays when the lid is opened. (4) A second female voice enters briefly in a conversational, friendly manner, discussing the colors 'Ice Moon Blue' and 'Matcha Green'. (5) The main vocal returns to announce the price and a call to action regarding the upcoming movie sequel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; traditional Chinese subtitles translate the dialogue throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '動物方程式 最新不鏽鋼水壺' (Zootopia latest stainless steel water bottle) in large pink/yellow letters; '$459' price overlay; 'Judy Hopps' and 'Nick Wilde' labels; '超級可愛' (Super cute) variety-show style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Product Demonstration -> Price and Closing CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women; one wears a brown puffer jacket and a patterned fishtail skirt, the other wears a light grey off-the-shoulder dress and a white bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with tall shelves, industrial lighting, and stacks of product boxes in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Price Reveal -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a new 'Zootopia' themed Disney licensed water bottle available at Costco. It leverages the appeal of popular movie characters (Judy and Nick) and the upcoming sequel to encourage viewers to purchase the item immediately.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the product, naming the store (Costco), and displaying the exact price point.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy shopping vlog aesthetic with colorful captions and enthusiastic delivery.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: A typical 'Costco find' style social media video optimized for quick consumption and product discovery.
